"description": "### Impact
An out-of-bounds write may be triggered when loading a specially crafted PSD image. Pillow >= 10.3.0 users are affected.

### Patches
Pillow 12.1.1 will be released shortly with a fix for this.

### Workarounds
`Image.open()` has a `formats` parameter that can be used to prevent PSD images from being opened.

### References
Pillow 12.1.1 will add release notes at https://pillow.readthedocs.io/en/stable/releasenotes/index.html", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00367, "percentile": 0.28569}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-cfh3-3jmp-rvhc", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-02-11T14:22:50Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cfh3-3jmp-rvhc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-cfh3-3jmp-rvhc"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-25990"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-02-11T21:16:20Z", "published_at": "2026-02-11T14:22:50Z", "references": ["https://github.com/python-pillow/Pillow/security/advisories/GHSA-cfh3-3jmp-rvhc", "https://github.com/python-pillow/Pillow/pull/9427", "https://github.com/python-pillow/Pillow/commit/54ba4db542ad3c7b918812a4e2d69c27735a3199", "https://pillow.readthedocs.io/en/stable/releasenotes/12.1.1.html", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-25990", "https://github.com/python-pillow/Pillow/commit/9000313cc5d4a31bdcdd6d7f0781101abab553aa", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cfh3-3jmp-rvhc"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/python-pillow/Pillow/security-advisories/GHSA-cfh3-3jmp-rvhc", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/python-pillow/Pillow", "summary": "Pillow affected by out-of-bounds write when loading PSD images", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-30T20:14:49Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-cfh3-3jmp-rvhc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "12.1.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "pillow"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 10.3.0, < 12.1.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Pillow affected by out-of-bounds write when loading PSD images
